queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between having no checking account and the mitigation of credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk associated with critical credit history or other existing credits and their contribution to lowering default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical impact of a checking account balance below 0 DM on credit risk reduction and borrower solvency.
